de.uka.ilkd.key.control

Class DefaultProofControl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.AbstractProofControl
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.DefaultProofControl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofControl

    public class DefaultProofControl
extends AbstractProofControl
    The default implementation of ProofControl.

      boolean isInAutoMode()
      Checks if the auto mode is currently running.
      void runMacro(Node node, ProofMacro macro, PosInOccurrence posInOcc)

      void stopAutoMode()
      Requests to stop the current auto mode without blocking the current Thread until the auto mode has stopped.

      Blocks the current Thread while the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl is active.

    • Constructor Detail

      • DefaultProofControl

        public DefaultProofControl(UserInterfaceControl ui,
                           DefaultUserInterfaceControl defaultProverTaskListener)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        ui - The UserInterfaceControl in which this ProofControl is used.
        defaultProverTaskListener - The default ProverTaskListener which will be added to all started ApplyStrategy instances.

      • DefaultProofControl

        public DefaultProofControl(UserInterfaceControl ui,
                           DefaultUserInterfaceControl defaultProverTaskListener,
                           RuleCompletionHandler ruleCompletionHandler)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        ui - The UserInterfaceControl in which this ProofControl is used.
        defaultProverTaskListener - The default ProverTaskListener which will be added to all started ApplyStrategy instances.
        ruleCompletionHandler - An optional RuleCompletionHandler.

      • stopAutoMode

        public void stopAutoMode()
        Description copied from interface: ProofControl
        Requests to stop the current auto mode without blocking the current Thread until the auto mode has stopped.

      • waitWhileAutoMode

        public void waitWhileAutoMode()
        Description copied from interface: ProofControl
        Blocks the current Thread while the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl is active.

      • isInAutoMode

        public boolean isInAutoMode()
        Description copied from interface: ProofControl
        Checks if the auto mode is currently running.
        Returns:
        true auto mode is running, false auto mode is not running.

      • runMacro

        public void runMacro(Node node,
                     ProofMacro macro,
                     PosInOccurrence posInOcc)
        Runs the given ProofMacro at the given PosInOccurrence on the given Node.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to start macro at.
        macro - The ProofMacro to execute.
        posInOcc - The exact PosInOccurrence at which the ProofMacro is started at.
